GAC / PAC

Adsorbents • Activated Carbon

Adsorbents

GAC / PAC

Granular and powdered activated carbon are used where adsorption of dissolved organics, color, odor, or residual chlorine is required.

Download DatasheetRequest TDS / CoA / Quote
Applications
Water purification, dechlorination, odor control, solvent recovery
Typical Specifications
Iodine value, mesh size, ash content, adsorption profile
Grades / Forms
Granular, powder
Technical Notes
Select grade and particle size based on contact time, loading, and downstream treatment design.
Documentation
CoA, TDS, MSDS available on request
